title: FitOn Holdings Services is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: FitOn Holdings Services is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FitOn Holdings Services! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FitOn Holdings Services:
FitOn Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FitOn Holdings Services!
